# DroidProxyPlus

DroidProxyPlus is a free, open-source macOS menu bar application that proxies authentication for AI coding tools including Claude Code and Codex.

## What DroidProxyPlus Does

- One-click OAuth authentication for AI coding tools
- Routes requests through localhost proxy (port 8317)
- Injects adaptive thinking parameters automatically
- Per-model effort controls for Claude and GPT models
- Integrates with Factory.ai Droids

## Supported AI Providers

- Claude Code (Anthropic)
- Codex (OpenAI)

## Supported Models

- Claude Opus 4.6
- Claude Sonnet 4.6
- GPT 5.3 Codex
- GPT 5.4

## Technical Details

- Platform: macOS 13.0+
- Architecture: Apple Silicon optimized
- License: MIT
- Auto-updates: Sparkle

- Homepage: /
- GitHub: https://github.com/KilimcininKorOglu/droidproxyplus
